title: Platypus Finance - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation on liquidity pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates 'cash' and 'liability' in liquidity pools after a flash loan
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> manipulate 'cash' and 'liability' in liquidity pools in single tx

red_flags: withdrawal of all available cash from LP-AVAX contract
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT MANIPULATES 'CASH' AND 'LIABILITY' IN LIQUIDITY POOLS AFTER A FLASH LOAN
summary: The attacker used flash loans to manipulate the prices within the Platypus LP-AVAX pool, leading to the draining of $2.2M. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for flash loans followed by price manipulation.
